title: Pauridia alticola

intro: Pauridia alticola, also known as the Mountain Pauridia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in relieving respiratory issues and wound healing.
